summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lades-Pro-MD WhatsApp Bot Dashboard. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI components are working correctly. Bot is connected with active WhatsApp session.

minor.issue: FastAPI proxy on port 8001 has connection backlog issues causing timeouts. Direct Node.js dashboard on port 3001 works correctly.

issues: Form styling appears basic compared to other pages - textarea and button could use glass-panel styling for consistency
Form inputs use basic styling instead of glass-input class used elsewhere

action_items: Consider applying consistent glass-panel styling to AI Komut Fabrikası and Uzak Komut pages for visual consistency
FastAPI proxy connection backlog could be investigated if external access through port 8001 is required
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard architecture is well-designed with Node.js serving static files and Express API on port 3001
FastAPI proxy on port 8001 correctly forwards requests but may need connection pooling optimization for high traffic
All API endpoints return proper JSON responses with success/error handling
UI is fully Turkish localized as required
seed_data_creation: None - using existing bot session data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard is fully functional. Bot has active WhatsApp session with phone 17788276641. All navigation, API endpoints, and UI components working. FastAPI proxy may timeout on long-running requests - use direct Node.js port 3001 for testing if needed.
